issues.description: Action type is 'Rest' but card text says 'Set up...as active' which means to change from rested to active state. Should be a state-change action (likely 'Activate' or inverse of Rest), not Rest.
Target filter missing type requirements. Must filter for {Supernovas} OR {Heart Pirates} type. Current target only filters by maxCost:5 and scope, but lacks type condition.
Target implicitly requires Characters to already be rested (per 'Set up...rested Characters'), but scope lacks 'HasRestingDon' or similar resting state filter.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Set up to 1 of your {Supernovas} or {Heart Pirates} type rested Characters with a cost of 5 or less as active.
